channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Elon Musk loses court battle against OpenAI
item.description: A California jury, on Monday found OpenAI cofounders CEO Sam Altman and president Greg Brockman not liable of unjustly enriching themselves by turning the once nonprofit company into a for-profit business.

item.title: Tesla Rival Becomes First Chinese EV Company To Make Robotaxis. Both Stocks Fall.
item.description: XPeng's new robotaxi offers an indirect validation of Tesla's approach to developing self-driving cars. On Monday, XPeng stock fell around 4% and Tesla dropped about 3%.

item.title: Starship V3 is here putting SpaceX closer to Mars than it has ever been
item.description: SpaceX is preparing to fly the most significant version of Starship yet. Flight 12, the debut of Starship V3, is targeted for Wednesday, May 20, lifting off from Starbase in South Texas at 6:30 p.m. ET.

item.title: SpaceX’s Mega-IPO Puts a Price on the Fear of Missing Out
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk has turned science fiction into reality for the better part of two decades, making believers rich and earning the benefit of the doubt from many on Wall Street. Away from rockets and electric cars, his companies are bending reality on another plane – convincing analysts t...

item.title: Musk says Tesla unsupervised FSD will be ‘widespread’ in the US by year-end — again
item.description: Elon Musk claimed that Tesla’s unsupervised “Full Self-Driving” will be “widespread in the US by the end of this year” during a virtual appearance at the Smart Mobility Summit in Tel Aviv today. Tesla currently operates fewer than 30 unsupervised robotaxis across three Texas cities. The claim mar...

item.title: Tesla’s Elon Musk Finds Time to Update Us on the Robo-Taxi Rollout
item.description: CEO Elon Musk says Tesla robo-taxis will probably be ‘widespread’ in the U.S. by the end of 2026. This week, though, he is focused on the SpaceX IPO.

item.title: For Tesla Robotics, the Bar Just Keeps Getting Higher
item.description: CEO Elon Musk promises to show off his newest robot later this year. But that’s not stopping competitors like Boston Dynamics and Unitree.

item.title: Tesla’s CFO Just Sold Stock. Why You Don’t Have To.
item.description: Tesla CFO Vaibhav Taneja recently disclosed a sale of 3,000 shares, covering his taxes from stock options.

item.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Micron, Regeneron, UnitedHealth, Dominion Energy, Ford, Tesla, Lumentum, and More
item.description: Dominion stock rallies after NextEra Energy strikes a roughly $67 billion deal to acquire the electric utility.

item.title: Musk hailed Tesla robotaxis in Texas as the start of a nationwide march. But actually hailing one is hard
item.description: On an earnings call last summer, Musk claimed that Tesla’s robotaxi fleet would soon be serving half the country. But reporters in Texas found the service was in beta mode.

item.title: Kuwait Electric Utility Vehicle Market Analysis Report 2025: Tesla, BYD, Nissan, Renault Group, Hyundai, Ashok Leyland Driving Innovation and Expansion - Forecast to 2030
item.description: The Kuwait Electric Utility Vehicle Market is primed for growth driven by government electrification initiatives, rising fuel prices, and consumer environmental awareness. Key opportunities include e-commerce delivery service expansion and potential government fleet contracts, bolstered by advanc...

item.title: Qatar Electric Commercial Vehicle Market Report 2025: $300 Mn Growth Drivers, Trends, Opportunities & Forecast to 2030 Featuring Yutong Bus Co., BYD Company, Tesla, Volvo Group, Daimler
item.description: The Qatar Electric Commercial Vehicle Market is poised for significant growth, driven by government electrification initiatives, increasing fuel prices, and eco-awareness. Key opportunities include expanding charging networks and strategic partnerships with fleet operators to boost electric vehic...

item.title: SpaceX, mega-IPOs could 'take oxygen out of the room' for AI players
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) has accelerated its timeline to go public, with murmurs indicating plans for an IPO in early June. D.A. Davidson head of technology research Gil Luria weighs in on the impact that these mega-IPOs, like SpaceX, could have on major AI players.

item.title: Jim Cramer Shares Why Tesla (TSLA) Is Better Than Ford
item.description: We recently published Jim Cramer Discussed A Mysterious Yellow Light & These 9 Stocks. Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer.

item.title: Elon Musk Provides New Timeline For Tesla Robotaxi Expansion
item.description: Elon Musk said Tesla robotaxis will be 'widespread' in the U.S. by the end of the year. The stock just formed a new, lower entry point.

item.title: Elon Musk Says Trump Account Contributions Are 'Nice Gesture' But Unnecessary — 'There Will Be No Poverty In The Future And So No Need To Save Money'
item.description: For most people, a conversation about children's savings accounts usually ends somewhere around compound interest and responsible adulthood. Then Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk showed up and turned it into a discussion about whether artificial intelligence could eventually wipe...

item.title: XPeng (XPEV) rolls first mass-produced robotaxi off the line, a China first
item.description: XPeng (NYSE: XPEV) announced today that it has rolled the first mass-produced unit of its robotaxi off the production line in Guangzhou. The milestone makes XPeng the first automaker in China to achieve mass production of a robotaxi built entirely through full-stack, in-house development. The pur...

item.title: Ford Rises 6%, Easily Outpaces General Motors and Tesla
item.description: Shares of Ford (NYSE:F) are up 6% in premarket trading Monday, changing hands near $14.21 after a one-two punch of strategic announcements. The move sharply outpaces both legacy peer General Motors (NYSE:GM) and EV leader Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) in the early session. For context, F stock entered the ...

item.title: Tesla’s Model Y Price Bump Makes The Ioniq 5 And Mustang Mach-E Look Better Than Ever
item.description: The Model Y’s price has been stable for the last two years, but times have changed.

item.title: Tesla Stock Drops as CFO Sells Shares. Can It Hold Above $400?
item.description: Tesla CFO Vaibhav Taneja recently disclosed a sale of 3,000 shares, covering his taxes from stock options.

item.title: SpaceX To Go Public June 12, As Speculation Rises
item.description: Rumors are largely gone. Insiders have leaked that the SpaceX IPO trigger will get pulled on June 12. Elon Musk’s company will try to raise $80 billion at a valuation north of $1.75 tillion.

item.title: China’s Xpeng begins mass production of robotaxis in Guangzhou
item.description: Chinese electric vehicle maker Xpeng said ‌on Monday it had ‌begun mass production of its first ​robotaxi at its Guangzhou headquarters, targeting fully driverless operations by early 2027. The Tesla rival is accelerating ‌its shift ⁠toward driverless vehicles and humanoid robotics as competition...

item.title: Two Tesla Robotaxi Crashes In Austin Are Putting Fresh Pressure On Elon Musk's EV Giant As Youtuber Says It's Time To 'Come Clean'
item.description: YouTuber Zack Nelson, aka JerryRigEverything, has urged Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk to clarify reports of Supervised Tesla Robotaxis reporting crashes in Austin. Supervised Robotaxi Crashes In a post on X on Sunday, Nelson quoted a post by TechCrunch, which reported that unredacted doc...

item.title: Elon Musk Says He Wants to Get SpaceX IPO Underway ‘Pretty Soon’
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk said he’s back in Texas working on plans for an initial public offering of SpaceX as the rocket and artificial intelligence company gears up for the largest listing of all time. Most Read from BloombergUS and Iran Far From Deal as Bond Rout Piles Pressure on TrumpWinners ...

item.title: SpaceX just forced Verizon, AT&T and T-Mobile to team up for the first time in history
item.description: America’s three largest wireless carriers, AT&T, T-Mobile, and Verizon, announced on On May 14, 2026 that they had agreed in principle to form a joint venture aimed at pooling their spectrum resources to expand satellite-based direct-to-device (D2D) connectivity across the United States in what c...

item.title: Judge In Australia Not Happy About Tesla Dragging Its Feet In Class Action Case
item.description: It took a lot longer than I expected, but there are class action lawsuits underway against Tesla in the US and Australia, and they just keep dragging on. In fact, in Australia, Tesla has been dragging things along so much that a judge there is losing his patience. This case ...

item.title: Tesla increases Actually Smart Summon speed by 33% in new FSD update
item.description: Tesla is rolling out FSD V14.3.3 today, and among the changes is a 33% speed increase to Actually Smart Summon — the feature now tops out at 8 mph, up from the 6 mph cap (less impressive when you put it like that). The speed bump is part of a broader update (software version 2026.14.6.6) that als...

item.title: Live intervention-free counter in FSD v14.3.3 raises potential safety concerns, Tesla improves Actually Smart Summon in this update
item.description: submitted by /u/CarCooler [link] [comments]

item.title: Why SpaceX Split Its Stock and 2 More Trillion-Dollar Issues
item.description: Three recent tidbits: SpaceX split its stock. Bloomberg reported Friday that SpaceX had split its stock five-to-one ahead of its massive IPO, which could raise $75 billion and value the company at up to $2 trillion. SpaceX didn’t respond to a request for comment about the split.

item.title: Tesla Just Raised Its EV Prices. Here’s Why.
item.description: Tesla often zigs when other companies zag. Tesla didn’t respond to a request for comment about the increases. Tesla hasn’t raised Model Y prices in the U.S.

item.title: Tesla’s $250 Million Germany Bet Is Interesting. It’s Spending More Before It Has the Payoff.
item.description: Tesla’s Germany battery expansion strengthens its Europe strategy, but rising spending is making the TSLA stock bull case harder to justify.

item.title: This Supercharger Extension Cable Promises To Fix A Big Pain Point, But Falls Short: Expert
item.description: The production version of Hansshow’s second-generation extension cable promised to fix all of its predecessor’s problems.

item.title: Is a SpaceX-Tesla Merger Elon Musk's Endgame? Here Are 4 Factors Investors Need to Consider.
item.description: Here are four things to consider if Elon Musk decides to merge his space empire with Tesla.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Hubs Highlight Autonomy Potential As Australian Scrutiny Builds
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NasdaqGS:TSLA) has started building dedicated robotaxi maintenance hubs, preparing for large scale autonomous ride hailing operations. At the same time, Tesla is facing rising legal and regulatory scrutiny in Australia over alleged misleading claims about vehicle safety and self driv...

item.title: Elon Musk Says If We Don't Do Something About Corruption And Waste, 'The Ship Of America Is Going To Sink' —And We're All Going Down With It
item.description: America's debt bill has grown so large that even the world's richest man, Tesla and SpaceX CEO Elon Musk, sounded less like a tech mogul and more like someone warning the country its financial engine was starting to smoke. "A...

item.title: Elon Musk, Chip Giant?
item.description: Elon Musk’s empire may be expanding if recent plans to spend up to $119 billion in new chip fab facilities become reality. The team discusses the implications for the industry and Musk’s companies.

item.title: Peter Navarro Once Slammed Tesla Over China Reliance—Now Xi Jinping Says Beijing Will Open Wider To US Companies Amid Trump Visit
item.description: President Donald Trump‘s counselor and economist, Peter Navarro, had criticized Elon Musk-led Tesla Inc. last year, calling the company a “car assembler” reliant on overseas parts from China and other countries. Now, Chinese President Xi Jinping has said the country...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) raises Model Y prices by up to $1,000 — first increase in two years
item.description: Tesla has increased Model Y prices in the US by up to $1,000 across its Premium and Performance trims. It marks the first price increase on the Model Y in two years. The move ends a prolonged period of aggressive price cuts that defined Tesla’s strategy throughout 2024 and 2025, signaling a poten...

item.title: Tesla Raises U.S. Model Y Prices. Its Stock Just Forged A Lower Buy Point.
item.description: Tesla raised U.S. Model Y prices for the first time in two years. Tesla stock has forged a new, lower buy point.

item.title: Ford’s EV Pivot Was Disastrous. Now It’s Trying to Compete with Tesla on Energy Storage.
item.description: Ford, which failed to meet its ambitious EV targets, is now betting on the energy storage business. Can the company compete with Tesla there?

item.title: Tesla Model Y prices just went up for the first time in two years
item.description: Tesla just raised Model Y prices for the first time in two years, with the largest increase being $1,000. The move signals shifting dynamics in the competitive electric vehicle market as the company continues to work on balancing demand, profitability, and accessibility. The new pricing affects p...

item.title: Elon Musk explains why he cannot be fired from SpaceX
item.description: Elon Musk cannot be fired from SpaceX, and there’s a reason for that. In a blunt post on X on Friday, Elon Musk confirmed plans to structurally shield his leadership at SpaceX, ensuring he cannot be fired while tying a potential trillion-dollar compensation package to the company’s long-term goal...

item.title: Tesla discloses two Robotaxi crashes to NHTSA
item.description: Tesla has disclosed information on two low-speed crashes that occurred in Austin with its Robotaxi platform. These incidents occurred with teleoperators steering the vehicle, and there were no passengers in the car at the time they happened. Newly unredacted data filed with the National Highway T...

item.title: Model Y - Premium/Perf Price Increase 05.15.26 US
item.description: Looks like they just increased the "Premium" Line of the Model Y today by $1,000 each and $500 for the Performance AWD Premium RWD --> $44,990 to $45,990 Premium AWD --> $48,990 to $49,990 Performance AWD --> $57,490 to $57,990 submitted by /u/S-is-for-Superman [link] [comments]

item.title: SpaceX Holders Sign Off on 5-for-1 Stock Split Ahead of IPO
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- SpaceX notified investors that it is executing a 5-for-1 stock split, a move that will reduce the price investors will pay for each share offered in its impending initial public offering.Most Read from BloombergWinners and Losers From Trump and Xi’s Beijing Summit TalksHormuz Oil F...

item.title: Tesla China Financing Push Tests Growth, Margins And Rich Valuation
item.description: Tesla has introduced new, more affordable financing offers for its locally made vehicles in China. The move comes after April retail sales in China declined and the company dropped out of the country's top ten EV makers. The offers are targeted at improving affordability and shoring up Tesla's po...

item.title: Tesla Patents New Trim Clip to Reduce Rattles and Vibrations
item.description: submitted by /u/RedgeQc [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Full Self Driving (Supervised) Now Permitted in Belgium
item.description: Following Tesla Full Self Driving (Supervised) approval and deployment in the Netherlands, the driver-assist software is now permitted to use in Belgium, sort of. For now, one Tesla car is allowed to test the technology in Flanders, the northern region of Belgium. Of course, if all goes well, Ful...

item.title: Tesla Slashing Down Payments & Loan Terms in China Amidst Dropping Sales
item.description: Like in other countries, and like other companies in China, Tesla has seen its sales drop in the largest EV market in the world this year. Tesla’s sales were down 10% year over year there in April, and they were down 15% across the first 4 months of the year. ...

item.title: Podcast: Tesla Robotaxi, Rivian R2 configurator is live, China is taking over EU factories, and more
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss updates to Tesla Robotaxi, Rivian R2 configurator going live, China taking over EU factories, and more. Today’s episode is sponsored by GM Energy .
